project_type: python-fastapi local bridge for GPT Actions
environment_constraints: Primary supported native path is Windows + Python 3.13
Process environment overrides .env when both define the same setting
Optional Docker path is repo-local and no longer depends on machine-specific Linux host mounts
security_constraints: Bearer auth is required for all routes
workspace access is bounded by WORKSPACE_ROOTS
Local secrets and runtime artifacts are ignored by git
SSH uses known_hosts loading plus RejectPolicy and allowlisted hosts/CIDRs
workflow_constraints: openapi.gpts.yaml is the GPT-facing action schema
This branch keeps current-state project memory aligned to this folder
run_service_and_smoke_check now uses cross-platform stream-reading logic instead of selector-based pipe polling
git history currently points to the reviewed local main branch state
